title: Managing a Temperature Excursion
alt: Five-step risk-based process for handling a GDP temperature excursion

items.label: Detect & contain
items.desc: Alarm reviewed; stock placed on hold, not destroyed

items.label: Verify the data
items.desc: Confirm logger calibration, placement and true duration

items.label: Assess vs stability
items.desc: Map exposure to MKT and permitted-excursion limits

items.label: Document disposition
items.desc: RP or QP records decision, evidence and approver

items.label: Close with CAPA
items.desc: Fix root cause; verify the action actually worked
